title: isocoma tehuacana
intro: Isocoma tehuacana, also known as Tehuacan golden bush, is a flowering shrub native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Isocoma tehuacana include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Isocoma tehuacana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
